events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.

meta_awareness.insight: Fern Ridge notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.

Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.

A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
